member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Http.HttpExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to bridge and .

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Http.HttpExtensions.ReadAsJsonAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpContent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the content as JSON.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Http.HttpExtensions.GetJsonAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Uri,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request and reads the response content as JSON.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Http.HttpExtensions.GetJsonAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request and reads the response content as JSON.

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Json
member.summary: Utilities for parsing JSON.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Json.Parse(System.Byte[],System.Text.Json.JsonDocumentOptions)
member.summary: Parses binary data as JSON.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Json.Parse(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonDocumentOptions)
member.summary: Parses string as JSON.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Json.TryParse(System.Byte[],System.Text.Json.JsonDocumentOptions)
member.summary: Tries to parse binary data as JSON or returns null if the input is malformed.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Json.TryParse(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonDocumentOptions)
member.summary: Tries to parse string as JSON or returns null if the input is malformed.

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for reading content from with coercion.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetBooleanCoercedOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetBooleanCoerced(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetByteCoercedOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetByteCoerced(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetDecimalCoercedOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetDecimalCoerced(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetDoubleCoerced(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetSingleCoercedOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetSingleCoerced(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.CoercionExtensions.GetInt16CoercedOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as an , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.summary: Gets the value of the element as an , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as an , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.summary: Gets the value of the element as an , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

Gets the value of the element as a , either by reading it directly or by coercing it from a string.

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Reading.MiscExtensions
member.summary: Miscellaneous extensions for .

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.MiscExtensions.Deconstruct(System.Text.Json.JsonProperty,System.String@,System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Deconstructs into its name and value components.

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for reading content from in a fault-tolerant way.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetPropertyOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary:
Gets a property by its name.
Returns null if the element is not an object, or if the property is not defined, or if the property has a null value.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetByIndexOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Gets a child element by its array index.
Returns null if the element is not an array, or if the index is out of bounds, or if the index refers to a null value.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.EnumerateArrayOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Enumerates the element as an array.
Returns null if the element is not an array.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.EnumerateArrayOrEmpty(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Enumerates the element as an array.
Returns an empty enumerator if the element is not an array.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.EnumerateObjectOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Enumerates the element as an object.
Returns null if the element is not an object.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.EnumerateObjectOrEmpty(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Enumerates the element as an object.
Returns empty enumerator if the element is not an object.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetBooleanOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetByteOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetDecimalOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetSingleOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetInt16OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetInt32OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetInt64OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetSByteOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetUInt16OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetUInt32OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetUInt64OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetStringOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetGuidOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetDateTimeOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetDateTimeOffsetOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a .
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.OptionalExtensions.GetBytesFromBase64OrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a base64-encoded byte array.
Returns null if the element contains a value of any other kind.

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Reading.PathExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for for dealing with paths.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.PathExtensions.GetPropertyByPathOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary:
Gets the that represents a property that matches the specified path.
Returns null if no matching property is found.
member.remarks: This currently supports only simple paths, e.g. 'prop1.prop2.prop3'.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.PathExtensions.GetPropertyByPath(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the that represents a property that matches the specified path.

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Reading.StringExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for reading strings from .

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.StringExtensions.GetNonNullString(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a non-null .

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.StringExtensions.GetNonEmptyStringOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a non-empty .
Returns null if the element contains an empty string or a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.StringExtensions.GetNonEmptyString(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a non-empty .

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.StringExtensions.GetNonWhiteSpaceStringOrNull(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary:
Gets the value of the element as a non-empty and non-whitespace .
Returns null if the element contains an empty string, a whitespace string, or a value of any other kind.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Reading.StringExtensions.GetNonWhiteSpaceString(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Gets the value of the element as a non-empty and non-whitespace .

member.name: T:JsonExtensions.Writing.OptionalExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for that enable conditional writing for nullable types.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Writing.OptionalExtensions.WriteBooleanValue(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Writes a value or null.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Writing.OptionalExtensions.WriteBoolean(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Writes a property or null.

member.name: M:JsonExtensions.Writing.OptionalExtensions.WriteNumberValue(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.Nullable{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a value or null.

member.summary: Writes a property or null.

member.summary: Writes a property or null.

member.summary: Writes a value or null.

member.summary: Writes a property or null.

member.summary: Writes a value or null.

member.summary: Writes a property or null.
